title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at JLL India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at JLL India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? JLL India in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JLL India:
JLL India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JLL India!
